indicators.name: Dining table
indicators.rationale: The dining table provides a surface for food preparation.

indicators.name: Cabinets
indicators.rationale: Cabinets offer storage for cooking utensils and ingredients.

indicators.name: Floor-wood
indicators.rationale: Wooden flooring is common in kitchens but may be slippery when wet.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for daily cooking due to the presence of a dining table and cabinets, but the wooden flooring could pose a slip hazard.
